title: Glorious Energizing Indian Steak Idli
description: A mustardy and aerated Indian dish featuring fillet of steak, perfect for a energizing meal, this sugar-free-friendly idli is a unique twist on traditional Goan cuisine.
instructions: Cut the fillet of steak into small pieces and season with salt and black pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of ghee or oil in a pan over medium heat and cook the steak pieces until browned.
In a large bowl, mix together the idli batter mix, coconut milk, and mustard seeds.
Add the cooked steak pieces to the idli batter mix and stir well.
Grease the idli molds with the remaining 1 tablespoon of ghee or oil.
Pour the idli batter mix into the molds and steam for 15 minutes.
Serve the idlis hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Let the idlis rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to settle.
